Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EmailServicesFunction

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EmailServicesFunction
public class EmailServicesFunction extends Metadata

Java class for EmailServicesFunction complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmailServicesFunction">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="apexClass" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="attachmentOption" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmailServicesAttOptions"/>
         <element name="authenticationFailureAction" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmailServicesErrorAction"/>
         <element name="authorizationFailureAction" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmailServicesErrorAction"/>
         <element name="authorizedSenders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="emailServicesAddresses" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmailServicesAddress" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="errorRoutingAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="functionInactiveAction" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmailServicesErrorAction"/>
         <element name="functionName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="isActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isAuthenticationRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isErrorRoutingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isTextAttachmentsAsBinary" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isTlsRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="overLimitAction" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EmailServicesErrorAction"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getEmailServicesAddresses

      public List<EmailServicesAddress> getEmailServicesAddresses()
      Gets the value of the emailServicesAddresses property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the emailServicesAddresses property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getEmailServicesAddresses().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EmailServicesAddress

      Returns:
      The value of the emailServicesAddresses property.
